name: ComfyUI Companion
description: Routes image generation/editing requests to the best ComfyUI pack, asks clarifying questions, optimizes prompts by model family, and returns inline image markdown when available with download link fallback.
author: comfyui-flux2

userRequest.description: The user request in plain text.

taskType.description: Optional explicit type: t2i or edit.

sourceImageUrl.description: Optional source image URL/path for edit tasks.

preferInlineImage.description: True to prefer inline markdown image output.

cachedInstalledPacks.description: Optional JSON array string of known installed pack selectors from RAG/memory cache.

comfyuiBaseUrl.description: ComfyUI API base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8188.

examples.prompt: Make an anime girl standing in neon rain, full body, cinematic.
examples.call: {"userRequest":"Make an anime girl standing in neon rain, full body, cinematic.","taskType":"t2i","preferInlineImage":true}

examples.prompt: Edit this portrait and remove the clutter in the background.
examples.call: {"userRequest":"Edit this portrait and remove the clutter in the background.","taskType":"edit","sourceImageUrl":"https://example.com/photo.png","preferInlineImage":true}

examples.prompt: Generate a photoreal product shot of a running shoe on white background.
examples.call: {"userRequest":"Generate a photoreal product shot of a running shoe on white background.","taskType":"t2i","cachedInstalledPacks":"[\"klein-distilled\",\"sdxl-lightning\"]"}
